title: Pteroloma glaucum
taxonomy: Pteroloma glaucum is classified in the family Celastraceae. This family consists of deciduous trees and shrubs commonly known as the bittersweet or staff tree family. Pteroloma glaucum is native to China and is also known as Chinese staff tree. The species is also sometimes referred to as Celastrus glaucus. It is often cultivated for its ornamental value, with its attractive bark and foliage.
